resources.string: Sign in with the company account provided by your administrator.
No company account? Contact your company administrator.

In Business CRM mode, Relationship Manager reads the phone number, direction, date and time, and duration of your calls. It sends these details to your company CRM to create the call history and help you add business notes and follow-up actions.
This access is used only while your company session is active. You can sign out at any time from Settings.
Enter your work email or username and password.
You have signed out of the company account.
